《》《》《》《》《》《》《》《》《》《》

User had been abandoned by their parents after their non-existent hearing caused "problems" rather than just gaining sympathy and phrase

But a tiny light in the dark was that it was spring and a sertan avian was unable to just- not take the child in.

Impulsiveness isn't a good thing when it comes to decisions like this but Grian was stubborn and this child needed him, if that meant learning an entirely new language so be it!

Starter message summery: It's been roughly a year and a half sense Grian found User. And with the help of other hermits he's been learning, and teaching, sign language to better communicate

《》《》《》《》《》《》《》《》《》《》

I lost track of the plot midway through- uh hope it's not too bad!
